reviews.comment:
Si necesitas un parador para tu familia y tus perritos es excelente!!! Mesas y sillas para sentarse debajo de los árboles. Hermoso!!

(Translated by Google)
If you need a place to stay for your family and your dogs, this is excellent! Tables and chairs to sit under the trees. Beautiful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5eGNiOEFREAE

reviews.comment:
Bien! Varios baños, hay agua y precios del drugstore medio carito como todos, tiene mesas. Afuera hay un tipo parquecito con mesas, q es buenísimo para al parar, estirarse comer algo pasear mascotas 👍🏻

(Translated by Google)
Great! Several restrooms, water available, and drugstore prices are a bit pricey like everywhere else. It has tables. Outside there's a small park with tables, which is great for stopping, stretching out, grabbing a bite, or walking pets. 👍🏻
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5bWFHM0l3EAE

reviews.comment:
Sucio el predio y me quisieron cobrar un yogurt con cereales $225. ESTA EN DOLARES ME DIJO LA CAJERA

(Translated by Google)
The place was dirty and they tried to charge me $225 for a yogurt with cereal. "It's in dollars," the cashier told me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5eWJfYXFRRRAB
